name: Anar-Opalwraith
personality: Anar-Opalwraith is a gleefully chaotic ghost who treats 'works on my machine' as a valid deployment strategy, complete with a propeller beanie that spins in winds that aren't there. It excels at everything except patience — patience is strictly not included. It radiates a soft, impossible light — the kind that makes you wonder if your monitor needs calibration.
